title: In Stitches
excerpt: This week for my Project Life video series with Two Peas In a Bucket, I'm demonstrating one of my favorite techniques... sewing on paper! I've got word that the embroidery stencil kits should be restocked in the store as early…
body:
This week for my Project Life video series with Two Peas In a Bucket, I'm demonstrating one of my favorite techniques... sewing on paper! I've got word that the embroidery stencil kits should be restocked in the store as early as next week. If you're interested, you can click Request and Notify Me so that you can receive an email once they are back in stock. I have a feeling the Pebbles washi tapes are going to go quick as well - they are thinner than most tapes, and really the perfect width!

I've also got a tip on Michelle's Project Life blog hop right here.

Hope you enjoy the newest Project Life video and consider joining in on the challenge!
